title: polypodium cultratum var. elasticum
intro: Polypodium cultratum var. elasticum, also known as the Elastic Polypody, is a species of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family and is native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, cuts, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Polypodium cultratum var. elasticum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote tissue repair, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin problems.
